svg.title: Systems-level flowchart: adversarial influence operations and Western democratic vulnerabilities
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how adversarial states exploit liberal democracy's open legal architecture through three ideological silos — MAGA right, neoliberal centre, and anti-imperialist left — producing epistemic decay, policy deadlock, and material harm to the median American household.

g.text: FARA gaps · platform immunity · no disclosure rules
Parasocial trust · algorithmic amplification · regulatory arbitrage
Public trust collapse · planning paralysis · capital freeze
FARA reform · algorithmic audits · prebunking · IDI index
